products.name: Loro Piana Herringbone Overcoat
products.desc: Cut from a heavyweight herringbone wool sourced from a historic Biella mill, this overcoat is fully canvassed by hand and finished with horn buttons.

products.name: Hand-Knit Cashmere Roll-Neck
products.desc: Hand-knitted from four-ply Mongolian cashmere on traditional needles, taking a single artisan eleven hours to complete.

products.name: Flannel Pleated Wide-Leg Trouser
products.desc: A relaxed, fluid trouser in brushed Italian flannel with double forward pleats and a hand-picked waistband.

products.name: Double-Breasted Wool Silk Blazer
products.desc: A wool-silk blend blazer with a soft, unstructured shoulder and horn buttons, tailored fully by hand in-house.
